summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 51 • Sleep 61 • Strain 100%

Read
The new intake changes the shape of the day: protein is no longer the weak link, and the calorie window has reopened after a heavy-output stretch. With recovery only middling and sleep light, today favors muscle retention and measured demand over another hard push.

Covered, but not limitless.

Performance: Covered, but not limitless.
